qa_pairs.question: Where can I find tutorials for NAMD?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find NAMD tutorials at http://www.ks.uiuc.edu/Training/Tutorials/.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a link to NAMD tutorials?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, NAMD tutorials are available at http://www.ks.uiuc.edu/Training/Tutorials/.
